title: US star Christian Pulisic exits World Cup match against Belgium with foot injury | Associated Press | winchesterstar.com
original_text:
US star Christian Pulisic exits World Cup match against Belgium with foot injury | Associated Press
AP
United States forward Christian Pulisic has left the Americans' World Cup round of 16 game against Belgium with a foot injury
By ANDREW DESTIN - AP Sports Writer
Jul 6, 2026
Jul 6, 2026
United States' Christian Pulisic reacts after a challenge during the World Cup round of 16 soccer match against Belgium in Seattle, Monday, July 6, 2026.
